title: Maximo: Ghosts to Glory Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Capcom's sword-and-armor platformer combines hack-and-slash combat with armor durability and stage-based progression.
narrative.core_loop: Hack through stages, manage armor durability, collect coins, and rescue Maximo's queen.

mechanics.map_notes: Core melee primary combat defines Maximo: Ghosts to Glory stage design.
mechanics.expression: Core melee primary combat defines Maximo: Ghosts to Glory stage design.

mechanics.map_notes: Maximo: Ghosts to Glory uses depletable health pool for world structure.
mechanics.expression: Maximo: Ghosts to Glory uses depletable health pool for world structure.

mechanics.map_notes: linear stage gauntlet drives progression in Maximo: Ghosts to Glory.
mechanics.expression: linear stage gauntlet drives progression in Maximo: Ghosts to Glory.

mechanics.map_notes: Hazards and obstacles test traversal mastery in Maximo: Ghosts to Glory.
mechanics.expression: Hazards and obstacles test traversal mastery in Maximo: Ghosts to Glory.

mechanics.map_notes: Checkpoints and stage boundaries save progress between attempts.
mechanics.expression: Checkpoints and stage boundaries save progress between attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives or health gates retries on failure.
mechanics.expression: Lives or health gates retries on failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss encounters follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Boss encounters follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.
mechanics.expression: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss victories and key objectives unlock subsequent content. (Maximo: Ghosts to Glory)

mechanics.map_notes: Major encounters shift behavior across multiple phases. (Maximo: Ghosts to Glory)

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Maximo: Ghosts to Glory through its core platformer loop.
